Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Set Aside Default & Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: KARI M. MYRON, ESQ. OF TUVERSON & HILLYARD (949)752-7855 FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, ZHI F. BAO.
NO APPEARANCE BY OPPOSING PARTY.
RULING:
MS. MYRON REPRESENTED IN OPEN COURT THAT SHE DID NOT NOTIFY THE OPPOSING PARTY OF HER INTENTION TO APPEAR IN COURT TO ARGUE THE MATTER. THE COURT ADVISED HER TO CALL OPPOSING PARTY IF SOMEONE IS ABLE TO APPEAR. MATTER WAS PASSED TO THE END OF CALENDAR. MS. MYRON CALLED AND LEFT A MESSAGE. THE MATTER WAS RECALLED AND ARGUED BRIEFLY AND THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ZHI F BAO'S MOTION To Set Aside Default & Default Judgment -- GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO PAY $250.00 IN COSTS FOR SEEKING ENTRY OF DEFAULT. 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER OR OTHERWISE RESPOND. REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780 (DAG/301/EW)
